title: Fast Smoky Spanish Lemongrass Skewers
description: A quick and flavorful Whole30-friendly dish featuring lemongrass stalks and a smoky twist on traditional Catalan cuisine, with a buttery and crumbly texture.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Trim the lemongrass stalks to about 6 inches long and peel off any tough outer layers.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture evenly onto the lemongrass stalks.
Thread 2-3 lemongrass stalks onto each skewer, if using.
Grill the lemongrass skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Brush the ghee or clarified butter onto the lemongrass during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the heat and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
